name: Windrise Venti
description:
🍃 While walking around Mondstadt near the Windrise tree, you see a familiar friend.

(Limitless ver)

This is a bot trained on a lot of information from Venti’s in-game character stories, his voice lines (including Serenitea Pot, stories, and events), and some original text as well. 🌳

Please feel free to give feedback! I would be happy to know how to improve him.

LIMITED VERSION HERE

DEEPSEEK VERSION HERE

~~~~~

Notes🎶

  • This bot veers towards the wholesome side of things.

  • The user has the role of the Traveler in the game. Their gender and whether they are Aether or Lumine is not specified.
